file_insights.critical_details: Each subtask includes templated .bop card creation path with {glyph} placeholder requiring substitution; spec_content is markdown-embedded with full requirements/acceptance criteria

patterns_discovered.description: bop project seeding its own backlog as jobcards to be processed by the dispatcher
patterns_discovered.relevance: Validates card format and dispatcher workflow on real internal tasks

patterns_discovered.description: 7 cards spread across 4 teams (team-arch, team-cli, team-quality, team-intelligence) with glyph-based visual identification
patterns_discovered.relevance: Enables parallel team execution and multi-service coordination

patterns_discovered.description: Complete task specifications embedded in implementation_plan.json as spec_content strings rather than separate .md files
patterns_discovered.relevance: Enables single-file plan authorship; content still readable but requires parsing for long-term maintenance

patterns_discovered.description: Each subtask includes explicit verification.type and command with expected output (jq filters to check card existence)
patterns_discovered.relevance: Enables automated validation without manual bop list inspection

patterns_discovered.description: All cards reference patterns_from: ['.cards/templates/implement.bop/'] ensuring consistency in structure
patterns_discovered.relevance: Maintains card format compliance across diverse teams

gotchas_discovered.context: files_to_create paths contain {glyph}-card-name.bop/ requiring heart emoji (🂱) replacement
gotchas_discovered.risk: Cards created with literal {glyph} in directory names instead of unicode
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Note in subtask-1-1 indicates proper glyph (🂱) was used; remaining 7 subtasks still pending substitution

gotchas_discovered.gotcha: Phase marked parallel_safe but sequential execution
gotchas_discovered.context: workflow rationale states 'simple' single-service task, yet 8 subtasks listed as parallelizable
gotchas_discovered.risk: Misleading parallelism claim; actual execution depends on manual card creation sequencing
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Test if bop factory can ingest all 7 pending cards concurrently

gotchas_discovered.context: All verification use `cargo run --bin bop -- list --json`
gotchas_discovered.risk: Slow verification loop if run in sequence; incremental cargo may recompile on spec changes
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Pre-build binary once before verification loop

gotchas_discovered.context: implementation_plan.json created but remaining card creation incomplete
gotchas_discovered.risk: Plan exists but real cards don't; dispatcher has nothing to process yet
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Next phase must execute subtasks 1-2 through 1-8 to populate pending/

approach_outcome.completed_work: Implementation plan JSON created with 8 well-defined subtasks; subtask-1-1 (watchpaths-dispatcher card) successfully created and verified
approach_outcome.remaining_work: 7 pending subtasks (jj-gitignore-audit, bop-serve, bop-doctor-checks, e2e-factory-test, adapter-stress-test, model-routing, final verification)
approach_outcome.commit_message_quality: Descriptive: auto-claude: subtask-1-1 - Create watchpaths-dispatcher card for team-arch
approach_outcome.verification_passed: subtask-1-1 verified with `cargo run --bin bop -- list --state pending --json | jq -r '.[] | select(.id == "watchpaths-dispatcher") | .id'` returning 'watchpaths-dispatcher'
approach_outcome.artifact_quality: High - plan structure enables both manual execution and potential automation; all 7 remaining cards have clear acceptance criteria

recommendations.recommendation: Automate glyph substitution in card creation
recommendations.rationale: 7 remaining subtasks reference {glyph} placeholder; automated substitution would prevent manual errors and enable batch card creation
recommendations.implementation: Update .cards/templates/implement.bop/ or card factory to auto-substitute glyph based on team prefix before creating directory

recommendations.recommendation: Execute remaining 7 subtasks in parallel if possible
recommendations.rationale: Each subtask creates independent card with isolated spec; parallelization could reduce total wall-clock time
recommendations.implementation: Run subtasks 1-2 through 1-7 concurrently in separate workspace branches; subtask 1-8 remains verification-gate at end

recommendations.recommendation: Extract spec_content to separate .md files for long-term maintainability
recommendations.rationale: 7 embedded markdown specs in JSON are correct for plan authorship but harder to edit/review individually
recommendations.implementation: Post-creation: extract spec_content strings to .cards/TEAM/CARDID/.cards/spec.md; keep plan.json as index

recommendations.recommendation: Add phase-2 plan for card dispatch and queue
recommendations.rationale: Current plan only covers card creation (pending state); no plan for dispatcher triggering, running, or result collection
recommendations.implementation: Add phases 2-3 covering factory install, dispatcher run with mock adapter, and verification of done/ cards

recommendations.rationale: 4 team glyphs (🂱 team-arch, 🂲 team-cli, 🂳 team-quality, 🂴 team-intelligence) not yet documented
recommendations.implementation: Add mapping table to CONTRIBUTING.md or cards/README.md for consistency in future dogfood cycles
